description: Worker Bonifacio Caput presents to the site clinic with severe acute watery diarrhea and dehydration, coinciding with a known failure of the facility's water filtration system. As the EHS coordinator, document this sentinel case in GNU Health (Login: admin / gnusolidario). The documentation must include an active condition for Giardiasis (ICD-10 A07.x) or Infectious gastroenteritis (ICD-10 A09), a clinical evaluation recording dehydration vitals (Heart Rate of at least 100 bpm and Systolic Blood Pressure of 100 mmHg or lower), and a single prescription order for Metronidazole plus an additional medication like Sodium Chloride or Oral Rehydration Salts. Additionally, order a diagnostic laboratory test (e.g., Stool analysis or CMP) and schedule a follow-up appointment for 1 to 3 days from today.
